Author: _Play_
Description: From a flashing sequence of digits, determine where a certain number of digits ended up in a maze after movement, and then determine which five buttons to press and when. Tags: red-background, red-bg, y-button, yes-button, n-button, no-button, display, flashing-digits
Name: Cruel Dividable By 2

Souvenir.Explanation: Souvenir could ask about the module's flashing sequence of digits.
